text.title: A/B Testing Basics Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Is there a clear primary metric AND enough traffic to reach 80% power on the expected effect?

conclusion.verdict: instrument first; do not run an experiment
either narrow audience or pick higher-traffic surface
ship the fix; do not gate on metric movement

text.example: checkout-button-color experiment → preregister: primary=checkout_conversion, baseline=8.2%, MDE=0.5pp → sample_size=21000 → hash-bucket on user_id → ramp 1→5→25→50% → reach 21k → analyzer p=0.03, lift=+0.6pp → ship.
